assertions.assertion: Lists passkeys/WebAuthn/FIDO2 as a supported authentication method
assertions.rationale: Lists 'FIDO2/WebAuthn — Passkey support' as an option.

assertions.assertion: Lists TOTP (authenticator apps) as a supported method
assertions.rationale: Mentions 'TOTP-based 2FA with authenticator apps' and shows configuration.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that multiple authentication methods can coexist for the same user
assertions.rationale: States 'You can offer multiple methods' and shows combining them.

assertions.assertion: Notes that OTP (email/SMS) is the default passwordless flow
assertions.rationale: Does not mention OTP email/SMS as the default flow; presents username/password as the traditional default.
